name_cn:
CARRYALL Handbag #️⃣M46203
Exclusive global launch! This style is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications, with dynamic chips and changing codes. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, latest official website gift box!
29 x 24 x 12 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Worn calf leather trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Small interior patch pocket
Zippered interior pocket
Leather strap and magnetic snap closure
Leather strap secures detachable zip pocket
Strap: Detachable, adjustable
Drop length: 27.0 cm
Drop length adjustable to: 48.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, detachable
Made in France
